segments.text: This course from Indian Institute of Management Ahmedabad [music]
will change how you think about your job not by teaching you how to succeed but by teaching you how to avoid regret after you succeed. [music] The course is
called the remains of the MBA. It's built around a novel by Kazuo Ishiguro [music] the remains of the day. The story follows a man who does everything right professionally. [music]
Disciplined, loyal, respected, excellent at his work. And only at the end of his career does he realize what that [music]
excellence quietly cost him. And this isn't just one course. I am Ahmedabad offers several [music] highquality
self-paced courses on its official platform. I've shared the link in the pinned [music] comment. So instead of making a New Year's resolution to work harder, make one to think better.
[music] Follow full disclosure for ideas that shape your life, not just your
